description: baseline run after reset: startup measured but plugin_count probe returned empty in non-tty command substitution; fixing harness output
lazy-load heavy kickstart modules and drop custom import/todo-comments for minimal nvim profile; startup now 18.045ms with 20 plugins
remove tokyonight plugin/theme for lean default colors; startup improved to 16.134ms with 19 plugins
defer which-key load from VimEnter to VeryLazy; startup improved to 14.603ms while retaining key-hint functionality
lazy-load guess-indent on buffer events; measured 16.022ms so no gain over current profile
disable several builtin runtime plugins in init.lua; startup 15.026ms (slightly worse), so reverted
retest removing guess-indent under latest baseline; plugin count 18 but startup regressed to 15.773ms
remove which-key from minimal profile entirely; startup improved to 14.234ms and plugin count dropped to 18
remove guess-indent after dropping which-key; startup regressed to 17.29ms despite plugin count 17
remove mini.nvim from plugin set; startup regressed to 14.935ms so kept mini for UX
remove conform from minimal plugin set; startup improved to 13.769ms with 17 plugins
startup improved slightly without gitsigns (13.651ms) but rejected: git gutter feedback is part of required minimal UX
enable vim.loader explicitly in init.lua; no improvement (13.813ms), reverted
rewrite lazy-plugins.lua to compact minimal file; no startup gain (15.904ms), reverted to previous structure
stricter mirror/doc checks surfaced 3 unresolved drift items; experimental criteria expanded but no stable fix landed in this iteration
steady-state check of current minimal profile; startup 13.915ms, no improvement over best 13.769ms
compact rewrite of telescope plugin module increased startup to 15.138ms; revert and keep prior telescope file
remove lazydev integration from lsp/blink to cut one plugin; startup 13.805ms (slightly worse), reverted
defer guess-indent to BufReadPost/BufNewFile to avoid startup load; startup regressed to 14.849ms despite plugin_count 16
delay gitsigns to BufReadPost only; startup regressed to 14.855ms, keep prior BufReadPre/BufNewFile trigger
strip telescope fzf/ui-select deps for smaller plugin set (15 plugins) but startup regressed to 14.742ms
switch telescope from VeryLazy to key/cmd-triggered lazy loading with key specs; startup regressed to 15.985ms, revert
defer diagnostic keymap lookup via closure in keymaps.lua; startup regressed to 14.326ms
strip large kickstart banner/comments from init.lua and keep only minimal bootstrap; startup regressed to 14.814ms
remove telescope-ui-select dependency/extension to slim startup; startup regressed to 15.669ms, keep ui-select
remove lazy.nvim custom ui icons table from setup options; startup improved vs recent runs but still slower than best (14.595ms)
remove prose spellcheck autocmd from options.lua; startup regressed to 15.404ms and feature loss not justified
test removing prose spellcheck FileType autocmd from options.lua; startup regressed sharply to 17.301ms
rewrite keymaps.lua into compact minimal module (same mappings/autocmd, no kickstart prose); startup improved to 13.127ms
drop mini.statusline setup (retain mini.ai + mini.surround) to reduce VeryLazy initialization cost; startup improved to 13.297ms
remove mini plugin module entirely after dropping statusline; startup regressed to 13.803ms despite lower plugin_count
invalid run: options.lua rewrite was measured alongside unexpected dirty lazy-plugins drift (mini removed). discarding mixed-state measurement
retest removing mini plugin under current baseline; startup regressed to 14.355ms so keep mini.ai/surround
steady-state baseline after resume; startup 13.545ms with 17 plugins, slower than best observed
compact rewrite of lazy-plugins.lua (same plugin set) regressed startup to 14.349ms; revert
prune mini.nvim config to only mini.surround (remove mini.ai); startup regressed to 13.642ms with no plugin-count gain
drop mini.ai setup from mini module (keep mini.surround) to trim VeryLazy init cost; startup improved to 13.717ms
move mini.nvim load trigger from VeryLazy to BufReadPost/BufNewFile; startup regressed to 15.23ms
invalid rollback attempt restored old mini event=BufReadPost variant; measurement not comparable. resetting mini.lua to last known-good VeryLazy baseline
defer telescope plugin load from VeryLazy to BufReadPost/BufNewFile; startup improved to 12.924ms while keeping telescope available in file-edit sessions
remove guess-indent plugin from minimal profile; startup improved to 12.851ms and plugin_count dropped to 16
